title: micro-bloat
description: Utility mod that removes buttons and features to make the experience a little less bloated.
body:
Utility mod that removes buttons and features to make the experience a little less bloated.

# Features:

## Buttons

This mod primarily hides buttons this can be toggled in Options -> Microbloat (like all other features)

## Title Screen

- Realms Button

- Quit Button

- Language Button

- Accessibility Button

- Copyright text(toggle to hide it)

- Edition (toggle to hide it)

- Splash Text (toggle to hide it)

- Background(two Options: No Spin(Makes the Background stop spinning), 
   Dirt(makes the old School title screen))

## Options

- Difficulty Lock (toggle to hide it)

- Online Settings (toggle to hide it)

- Difficulty (toggle to hide it)

- Accessibility Guide (toggle to hide it)

- Auto Jump (toggle to disable it)

- Mouse Settings (toggle to hide it)

## Pause Screen

- Advancements (toggle to hide it)

- Stats (toggle to hide it)

- Send Feedback (toggle to hide it)

- Report Bugs (toggle to hide it)

- Share to LAN (toggle to hide it)

## In Game

- Death Score (toggle to hide it)

## Microsoft

- Snooper (toggle to disable it)

- Chat Reporting Button (toggle to hide it)
